org.bitstorm.gameoflife
Class GameOfLifeControls.ControlsEvent

java.lang.Object
  java.awt.Event
      org.bitstorm.gameoflife.GameOfLifeControls.ControlsEvent
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
Enclosing class:
GameOfLifeControls
public class GameOfLifeControls.ControlsEvent
extends java.awt.Event

Event class for GameOfLifeControls. Can pass speed, cellSize and shapeName. Objects from this class are generated by GameOfLifeControls

Author:
Edwin Martin
See Also:
GameOfLifeControls, Serialized Form

private  java.lang.String shapeName
           
private  int speed
           
private  int zoom

Method Detail

getSpeed

public int getSpeed()
Gets speed of Game

Returns:
speed (10 is fast, 1000 is slow)

getZoom

public int getZoom()
Gets size of cell

Returns:
speed (10 is big, 2 is small)

getShapeName

Gets name of shape

Returns:
name of selected shape
